languages.text: {n}Друкари шумно втягивает воздух и кривится, настороженно рассматривая дверь.{/n} "Попасться в такую очевидную ловушку огиров будет глупо. Если туда и входить, то только подготовленным и на своих условиях".

{n}The Drukhari noisily sniffs and makes a face, examining the door with distrust.{/n} "To fall into such an obvious Oghyr trap would be foolish. If you enter there, it must be when you are prepared and on your own terms."
languages.original_text: {n}Друкари шумно втягивает воздух и кривится, настороженно рассматривая дверь.{/n} "Попасться в такую очевидную ловушку огиров будет глупо. Если туда и входить, то только подготовленным и на своих условиях".

traits.locale_text: {n}The Drukhari noisily sniffs and makes a face, examining the door with distrust.{/n} "To fall into such an obvious Oghyr trap would be foolish. If you enter there, it must be when you are prepared and on your own terms."

{n}The Drukhari noisily sniffs and makes a face, examining the door with distrust.{/n} "To fall into such an obvious Oghyr trap would be foolish. If you enter there, it must be when you are prepared and on your own terms."

{n}The Drukhari noisily sniffs and makes a face, examining the door with distrust.{/n} "To fall into such an obvious Oghyr trap would be foolish. If you enter there, it must be when you are prepared and on your own terms."

languages.text: {n}デュカーリは鼻を鳴らしながら、不快な顔をして扉を疑いの目で見る。{/n}「こんなありふれたオグイヤーの罠に落ちるのは愚かだ。もしそこに入るなら、覚悟して、自分の条件で入るのだ」
languages.original_text: {n}The Drukhari noisily sniffs and makes a face, examining the door with distrust.{/n} "To fall into such an obvious Oghyr trap would be foolish. If you enter there, it must be when you are prepared and on your own terms."

traits.locale_text: ドルーカリは鼻を鳴らしながら、不快な顔をして扉を疑いの目で見る。「こんなありふれたオグイヤーの罠に落ちるのは愚かだ。もしそこに入るなら、覚悟して、自分の条件で入るのだ。」

languages.text: {n}那位黑暗灵族嗤嗤地嗅了嗅，随即皱起脸，充满戒备地打量着那扇门。{/n}“踏入如此明显的遗落者陷阱，未免也太过愚蠢。你要是想进去，最好挑个你准备万全，掌握主动的时候。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Drukhari noisily sniffs and makes a face, examining the door with distrust.{/n} "To fall into such an obvious Oghyr trap would be foolish. If you enter there, it must be when you are prepared and on your own terms."

traits.locale_text: {n}那位黑暗灵族嗤嗤地嗅了嗅，随即皱起脸，充满戒备地打量着那扇门。{/n}“踏入如此明显的遗落者陷阱，未免也太过愚蠢。你要是想进去，最好挑个你准备万全，掌握主动的时候。”

languages.text: {n}El Drukhari olisquea y hace una mueca mientras observa la puerta con desconfianza.{/n} «Caer en una trampa Oghyr tan evidente sería una necedad. Si entras ahí, que sea cuando estés preparad{mf|o|a}, bajo las condiciones que decidas».
languages.original_text: {n}The Drukhari noisily sniffs and makes a face, examining the door with distrust.{/n} "To fall into such an obvious Oghyr trap would be foolish. If you enter there, it must be when you are prepared and on your own terms."

traits.locale_text: {n}El Drukhari olisquea y hace una mueca mientras observa la puerta con desconfianza.{/n} «Caer en una trampa Oghyr tan evidente sería una necedad. Si entras ahí, que sea cuando estés preparad{mf|o|a}, bajo las condiciones que decidas».

languages.text: {n}Der Drukhari schnaubt lautstark und untersucht misstrauisch die Tür.{/n} "In eine derart offensichtliche Oghyr-Falle zu tappen, wäre töricht. Ihr könnt dort nur hineingehen, wenn Ihr bereit seid und nach Euren Regeln gespielt wird."
languages.original_text: {n}The Drukhari noisily sniffs and makes a face, examining the door with distrust.{/n} "To fall into such an obvious Oghyr trap would be foolish. If you enter there, it must be when you are prepared and on your own terms."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Drukhari schnaubt lautstark und untersucht misstrauisch die Tür.{/n} "In eine derart offensichtliche Oghyr-Falle zu tappen, wäre töricht. Ihr könnt dort nur hineingehen, wenn Ihr bereit seid und nach Euren Regeln gespielt wird."

languages.text: {n}Le Drukhari renifle bruyamment et grimace en examinant la porte d'un air méfiant.{/n} « Il serait stupide de se jeter dans ce qui est manifestement un piège tendu par les Oghyrs. Entrez-y seulement quand vous en aurez décidé ainsi, après vous être {mf|préparé|préparée} convenablement. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Drukhari noisily sniffs and makes a face, examining the door with distrust.{/n} "To fall into such an obvious Oghyr trap would be foolish. If you enter there, it must be when you are prepared and on your own terms."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le Drukhari renifle bruyamment et grimace en examinant la porte d'un air méfiant.{/n} « Il serait stupide de se jeter dans ce qui est manifestement un piège tendu par les Oghyrs. Entrez-y seulement quand vous en aurez décidé ainsi, après vous être {mf|préparé|préparée} convenablement. »

languages.text: {n}Drukhari, gürültülü bir şekilde burnunu çekip yüzünü buruşturarak kapıyı güvensizlikle inceliyor.{/n} "Böylesine bariz bir Oghyr tuzağına düşmek aptallık olur. Oraya gireceksen hazırlıklı olduğunda ve kendi şartlarında girmelisin."
languages.original_text: {n}The Drukhari noisily sniffs and makes a face, examining the door with distrust.{/n} "To fall into such an obvious Oghyr trap would be foolish. If you enter there, it must be when you are prepared and on your own terms."
